title: マブいドライブだっちゅ～の

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I stop by a cafe to take a break, and
just when I take a seat...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there! Quick question. If you were going
for a drive, would you rather go to the beach or
visit a new town?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there! Quick question. If you were going
for a drive, would you rather go to the beach or
visit a new town?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We're all going for a drive soon, but we can't
decide where to!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, putting on some classic tunes and getting
real misty-eyed while driving by the beach sounds
groovy and all...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But the excitement of exploring a new place is
also totally bodacious!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We could grab Italian food for lunch, then boogie
on down to the disco at night! I'm sure that'll
breathe some fresh air into everyone!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hang on! I was supposed to be getting your
input! My bad! That was totes bogus of me! So
where should we go?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My head is still reeling from the barrage of dated
terms Maruzensky keeps throwing at me, but I do
my best to answer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The roads are wider out there, and it feels
amazing cruising in my car at full speed! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Right on! The beach it is! Thanks! You're a
lifesaver! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Can't have a road trip without some excitement!
We can cruise on some new routes too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Booyah! I'm gonna give that shot! Thanks for
helping me make up my mind! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky chugs the nata de coco drink on the
table and leaves, bidding me farewell with a crisp
"Catch ya on the flipside."
